message:
fix: add tests for splitCamelCase and guard empty prefix config set

Follow-up to PR #1932. Adds TestSplitCamelCase and camelCase cases to
TestDeriveBeadsPrefix. Guards bd config set issue_prefix from running
with empty prefix in beads_types.go. Adds clarifying comment on the
"-" check in bead move.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
